name: sammagictv-monorepo
description: SamMagicTV multi-platform app built from StreamVault.

scripts.build:tizen: npm --prefix streamvault run build:web && node platforms/scripts/copy-streamvault-dist.mjs tizen
scripts.build:webos: npm --prefix streamvault run build:web && node platforms/scripts/copy-streamvault-dist.mjs webos
